rna_seq_validation.manifest_requirement: every experiment record must declare has_rnaseq == true
rna_seq_validation.file_inspection_requirement: wrapper must perform read-only inspection of each .ribo file and verify RNA-seq presence for the corresponding experiment before execution
rna_seq_validation.validation_success_condition: both manifest declaration and .ribo inspection are positive

sample_selection_csv.notes: Optional in v1 because the generated trial config should pass custom_experiment_list.

reject_if: handoff_manifest_path is missing or not valid JSON
manifest_version is not 1.0
manifest run_id does not match request run_id
input_mode is not experiment_level_ribo
experiments array is empty
any ribo_path does not exist
any ribo_path is not an experiment-level .ribo file
duplicate experiment_alias values exist
study_id is empty, conflicting, or ambiguous
two experiment records would materialize to the same sandbox path
any experiment has has_rnaseq != true
read-only inspection of any .ribo file cannot verify RNA-seq presence for the corresponding experiment
manifest has_rnaseq declaration contradicts observed .ribo contents
handoff is ribo-only for black-box TE mode
all.ribo is supplied as the sole input object without experiment-level records
nonpolya_csv is missing or lacks Gene column
grouping_csv is missing or lacks experiment_alias/cell_line columns
grouping_csv contains duplicate experiment_alias rows
grouping_csv does not cover every experiment_alias in the handoff manifest
execution_mode is not one of the frozen enum values
legacy_winsorized_counts is requested with a non-legacy custom counting policy
mixed-organism handoff is supplied
organism is outside the implementation-approved allowlist

legacy_default_counts.description: Use original Stage 0 extraction without a custom legacy winsorization callback.
operational_rules: No wrapper-defined preprocessing stage is allowed.
Stage 1, Stage 2, and Stage 3 remain unchanged legacy semantics.

legacy_winsorized_counts.description: Use original Stage 0 extraction with the exact audited process_coverage_fn callback pattern observed in trials/PAX_hela/config.py.

callback_contract.coverage_source: original Stage 0 get_coverage(...) path before callback application
callback_contract.aggregation_order: cap before aggregation to scalar count
must_not_vary: must not substitute cap_outliers for cap_outliers_cds_only
must not switch to a non-CDS region
must not add wrapper-defined transforms before or after the capping-and-sum step
callback_contract.fallback_behavior: reject legacy_winsorized_counts if this exact callback chain cannot be reproduced in the generated legacy trial config

operational_rules: No separate wrapper-side winsorization stage may be introduced.
The callback must follow the audited legacy semantics rather than define a new transform family.

non_goals: No direct in-place execution in the frozen legacy tree.
No requirement that all.ribo be present by default.
No use of all.ribo as the sole required input object.
No new internal reimplementation of original Stage 0/1/2/3 logic.
No species-generalization claims beyond audited assumptions.
No production integration wiring in this design task.
open_issues: Whether v1 should be strictly human-only or use a tiny explicit allowlist.
Whether a generated paxdb_filtered_sample.csv should also be staged for observability when custom_experiment_list is already supplied.
Whether checksums are mandatory or optional in the first implementation.
Whether a machine-readable failure code taxonomy should be frozen in implementation v1.
